sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) inf. of a Chaldee form of the verb גָּרַשׁ No. 2, q.v., Eze 36:5.

(2) a place to which cattle is driven forth to feed, pasture (from גָּרַשׁ No. 4), 1Ch 5:16 Eze 48:15 specially used of the open space around the towns of the Levites, used for feeding cattle, Num 35:2, sq.; Jos 21:11, sq.; 1Ch 6:40, sq.; whence these towns are called, 1Ch 13:2, עָרִי מִגְרָשִׁים.

(3) any open space surrounding a city or building, Eze 27:28 45:2 48:17 . Plur. ־ִים, once מִגְרְשֹׁות (as if from the sing. מִגְרֶשֶׁת); but masc. gen., Eze 27:28.
